title: Confirmed correct: Signature required, actor-keyId match, SSRF re-check at delivery, symlink rejection, decompression limits, webhook key in header
description:
The following pentest fixes are correctly implemented and have no regressions found:

1. Signature required: server.rs:457-464 rejects unsigned inbox requests with 401. Tests confirm this (test_inbox_rejects_unsigned, test_inbox_rejects_unsigned_activity, test_shared_inbox_rejects_unsigned).

2. Actor-keyId match: server.rs:549-558 compares activity[actor] against the actor_uri derived from keyId. The derivation (split at #) is correct.

3. actor_cache publicKey.owner validation: actor_cache.rs:73-78 requires owner == actor_uri, failing closed. Correct.

4. Delivery SSRF re-check: delivery.rs:142-153 re-validates inbox_uri at delivery time against is_private_host. Correct.

5. Symlink rejection: watch.rs:59-64 checks symlink_metadata before processing watched files. Correctly uses symlink_metadata (not regular metadata) so it cannot be TOCTOU-bypassed by race on the symlink itself (the check is on the symlink node, not what it points to).

6. Decompression bomb limits: media.rs:205-211 sets Limits::default() with max_alloc=64MB and uses reader.limits(). Correct. The 10MB network cap (content_length check + post-download check) also correct.

7. Webhook key in header: webhook.rs:38-44 reads from Authorization: Bearer or X-Webhook-Key, never from query string. Correct. Constant-time compare via SHA-256 hashes (webhook.rs:55-58) avoids timing side-channel.

8. Date freshness: server.rs:531-538 rejects requests where |age| > 300s. Uses unsigned_abs() correctly to catch both stale and future-dated requests.

9. is_private_host covers loopback, RFC1918, link-local, broadcast, IPv6 ULA/link-local, IPv4-mapped IPv6, localhost/.local/.internal names. Coverage is solid for the defined threat model.

10. Follow handler SSRF: follower_actor URL is validated (https only, not private) before fetching. shared_inbox_uri from the actor document is also filtered. inbox_uri is validated before storing.
close_reason: Fixed: redirect::Policy::none on all clients, require Digest+Date headers, corrected body limit comment
